# Index: .github

> Corpus index. Do not edit manually - refresh with the index-docs workflow.

## Subfolders

| Folder | Description |
|---|---|
| agents/INDEX.md | Specialist agent definitions and lifecycle-oriented metadata. |
| catalogs/INDEX.md | Shared discovery indexes for agents, instructions, prompts, and skills. |
| instructions/INDEX.md | Always-on policy instruction files maintained directly in this folder. |
| prompts/INDEX.md | Reusable prompt templates and supporting references. |
| scripts/INDEX.md | Automation scripts and supporting script documentation. |
| skills/INDEX.md | Reusable workflow skills, references, and skill-folder inventory. |
| workflows/INDEX.md | GitHub workflow automation definitions and release cadence checks. |

| File | Title | Category | Summary |
|---|---|---|---|
